name: design: Đồng bộ brand color #22c55e + sửa icon Về chúng tôi

tasks.name: Apply brand color + company icon edits to index.html
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && grep -q 'bg-primary text-white text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-primary-dark' index.html && grep -q 'id="download" class="bg-primary py-16 lg:py-20"' index.html && grep -q 'src="assets/images/company_logo.jpg" alt="Unknown Studio"' index.html

tasks.name: Verify regression: no legacy hex colors and no broken image refs
tasks.acceptance: cd '/Users/thuylenguyenmai/Desktop/Projects/Cuối tuần đi đâu/weekend-go-web' && ! grep -E '#(15803d|116b31)' index.html && ! grep 'company-logo.jpeg' index.html && test -f assets/images/company_logo.jpg && file assets/images/company_logo.jpg | grep -q 'JPEG image data'
